title: Markets
summary: 9609 AS — types of markets, market size, and competitive structure.
learningObjectives: Define a market in business terms.
Distinguish local, national, and global markets.

simpleExplanation.title: Where exchange happens
simpleExplanation.summary: A market is any arrangement where buyers and sellers meet. Firms analyse size, growth, and competition before entering.
steps: Market size: value or volume of sales.

sections.content: **Markets** (3.1.3) follows **3.1.2 demand/supply**. Use **market data** in case studies to justify strategy.
